mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no statistical relationship with FEDFUNDS changes (Rank IC < 0.02 over 3-year rolling windows).

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the unemployment rate exceeding 0.2 percentage points signals sudden labor market deterioration, triggering immediate negative S&P 500 returns over the following week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 55% of instances where UNRATE rises > 0.2pp.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month growth in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day returns (out-of-sample accuracy < 52%).

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices indicate strengthening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, which translates to positive corporate earnings revisions and positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases fail to precede positive 20-day SPX returns during recovery phases (t-stat < 1.5).

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in total nonfarm payrolls reflect sustained economic growth and rising consumer spending power, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the following week.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth shows zero predictive power for 5-day SPX direction (Rank IC consistently near zero across rolling windows).

mechanism_narrative: When consumer price inflation accelerates beyond a 3.5% annual threshold, anticipated monetary tightening and margin compression force negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX delivers positive 60-day returns in > 60% of periods where CPIAUCSL YoY exceeds 3.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent quarterly GDP expansion and monthly retail sales growth confirm robust aggregate demand, leading to positive earnings momentum and positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The combined GDPC1 and RSAFS signal yields a negative or flat 20-day forward return distribution (mean return < 0.1%).

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production during a late-cycle expansion signals manufacturing contraction and impending recession, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the following week.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines during late-cycle phases fail to predict negative 5-day SPX returns (accuracy < 48%).
